narrative:
Weston Twp Willow (precinct in Wood County) has 479 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.2 percentage points.
